nasb.text: The woman whom you saw is the great city, which reigns over the kings of the earth.”

esv.text: And the woman that you saw is the great city that has dominion over the kings of the earth.”

cnv.text: 你看見的那婦人，就是有權統治地上的眾王的那座大城。”

ccb.text: 你看见的那妇人就是那掌管世上众王的大城。”

csbs.text: 你所看见的那女人，就是那有王权统管地上众君王的大城。”
